lessons.title: Narraciones conectadas · 1
lessons.description: Aprende cuatro elementos nuevos y practícalos de inmediato.

activities.prompt: Narraciones conectadas
activities.explanation: Escucha primero. Después relaciona la forma escrita con su significado.

activities.prompt: Aprende y escucha
activities.target: I have visited three countries.
activities.explanation: He visitado tres países.
activities.audio: I have visited three countries.
activities.slow_audio: I have visited three countries.

activities.prompt: ¿Qué significa «I have visited three countries.»?
activities.target: I have visited three countries.
options: He visitado tres países.
Fue la primera vez.
Al principio, nadie sabía qué hacer.
activities.answer: He visitado tres países.
activities.explanation: «I have visited three countries.» significa «He visitado tres países.».
activities.audio: I have visited three countries.
activities.slow_audio: I have visited three countries.

activities.prompt: Escucha y elige la forma escrita correcta
options: Meanwhile, my sister called the police.
I have visited three countries.
I want to go back someday.
activities.answer: I have visited three countries.
activities.explanation: La forma escuchada es «I have visited three countries.»: He visitado tres países.
activities.audio: I have visited three countries.
activities.slow_audio: I have visited three countries.

activities.prompt: Aprende y escucha
activities.target: I have never travelled alone.
activities.explanation: Nunca he viajado solo.
activities.audio: I have never travelled alone.
activities.slow_audio: I have never travelled alone.

activities.prompt: ¿Qué significa «I have never travelled alone.»?
activities.target: I have never travelled alone.
options: ¿Alguna vez has estado allí?

Nunca he viajado solo.
activities.answer: Nunca he viajado solo.
activities.explanation: «I have never travelled alone.» significa «Nunca he viajado solo.».
activities.audio: I have never travelled alone.
activities.slow_audio: I have never travelled alone.

activities.prompt: Escucha y elige la forma escrita correcta
options: I have never travelled alone.
While I was walking home, it started to rain.
In the end, everything turned out well.
activities.answer: I have never travelled alone.
activities.explanation: La forma escuchada es «I have never travelled alone.»: Nunca he viajado solo.
activities.audio: I have never travelled alone.
activities.slow_audio: I have never travelled alone.

activities.prompt: Aprende y escucha
activities.target: While I was walking home, it started to rain.
activities.explanation: Mientras volvía a casa, empezó a llover.

activities.slow_audio: While I was walking home, it started to rain.

options: Ya he probado ese plato.
Mientras volvía a casa, empezó a llover.
Al final, todo salió bien.
activities.answer: Mientras volvía a casa, empezó a llover.
activities.explanation: «While I was walking home, it started to rain.» significa «Mientras volvía a casa, empezó a llover.».
activities.audio: While I was walking home, it started to rain.
activities.slow_audio: While I was walking home, it started to rain.

options: Since then, I always check the door.
I missed the train once.
While I was walking home, it started to rain.
activities.answer: While I was walking home, it started to rain.
activities.explanation: La forma escuchada es «While I was walking home, it started to rain.»: Mientras volvía a casa, empezó a llover.
activities.audio: While I was walking home, it started to rain.
activities.slow_audio: While I was walking home, it started to rain.
